title: Provide information on plants and their culture
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide information on plants and their culture demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify client issues or requirements

pcs.text: Initiate contact with the client in a timely and professional manner using interpersonal skills and communication techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Initiate contact with the client in a timely and professional manner using interpersonal skills and communication techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Initiate contact with the client in a timely and professional manner using interpersonal skills and communication techniques.

pcs.text: Assist the client in explaining issues or requirements by using attentive listening and questioning techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist the client in explaining issues or requirements by using attentive listening and questioning techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist the client in explaining issues or requirements by using attentive listening and questioning techniques.

pcs.text: Clarify the nature of the issue or requirements by gathering relevant information from the client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the nature of the issue or requirements by gathering relevant information from the client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the nature of the issue or requirements by gathering relevant information from the client.

pcs.text: Define the issue according to the amount of information gathered
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the issue according to the amount of information gathered?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the issue according to the amount of information gathered.

pcs.text: Seek assistance from appropriate personnel, and follow up with client where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek assistance from appropriate personnel, and follow up with client where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek assistance from appropriate personnel, and follow up with client where required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify client issues or requirements

elements.title: Identify preferred solution

pcs.text: Identify and develop recommendations, options or strategies using available in-house and online reference material, product information, own experience and collective workplace knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and develop recommendations, options or strategies using available in-house and online reference material, product information, own experience and collective workplace knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and develop recommendations, options or strategies using available in-house and online reference material, product information, own experience and collective workplace knowledge.

pcs.text: Examine and evaluate options and strategies using problem-solving techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine and evaluate options and strategies using problem-solving techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine and evaluate options and strategies using problem-solving techniques.

pcs.text: Determine optimal solution based on reasoned argument and gathered evidence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine optimal solution based on reasoned argument and gathered evidence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine optimal solution based on reasoned argument and gathered evidence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify preferred solution

elements.title: Provide information or preferred solution

pcs.text: Explain cultural requirements for the plant or recommended solution, including method of application, where applicable, and probable outcomes to the client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain cultural requirements for the plant or recommended solution, including method of application, where applicable, and probable outcomes to the client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain cultural requirements for the plant or recommended solution, including method of application, where applicable, and probable outcomes to the client.

pcs.text: Refer to original source of the plant and its cultural requirements, where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer to original source of the plant and its cultural requirements, where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer to original source of the plant and its cultural requirements, where necessary.

pcs.text: Use attentive listening and questioning techniques to respond to client requests for clarification or more information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use attentive listening and questioning techniques to respond to client requests for clarification or more information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use attentive listening and questioning techniques to respond to client requests for clarification or more information.
